name: Under Par Golf
about: Under Par Golf is a premier indoor golf simulator venue located in West Michigan, catering to both seasoned players and beginners. The facility features state-of-the-art aboutGOLF simulators, offering an unmatched golfing experience with data-driven technology for precise performance tracking. Pricing operates on a mixed model, including hourly rates for tee times and various membership options, with specific discounts available during peak times and seasonal variations. It is best suited for serious golfers, families, and corporate teams looking for a high-tech practice environment without weather constraints.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art aboutGOLF simulators providing unmatched accuracy and data tracking
Comprehensive club services including fittings, repairs, and equipment sales
Indoor golf leagues for competitive play in a controlled environment
User-friendly technology and knowledgeable staff for an optimal experience

faq.question: Do I need clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you will need to bring your own golf clubs, but the venue also offers club fitting services and equipment sales.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: No specific policy mentioned; it is recommended to contact the venue directly regarding outside food and drink.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time required for 18 holes is not specified, but typical simulator sessions vary based on player pace and group size.

faq.answer: No explicit mention of kid-friendly features or policies; family entertainment is listed as an option under booking.
